'''鈭歬-m-j-ch''' ('''kakamjechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaguen|vaguen]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-m-j-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaguen|vaguen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-m-j-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kakamjechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikamjechoko|thikamjechoko]] || [[word:jikamjechoko|jikamjechoko]] || [[word:shikamjechoko|shikamjechoko]] || [[word:kikamjechoko|kikamjechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukamjechoko|thuthukamjechoko]] || [[word:jujukamjechoko|jujukamjechoko]] || [[word:shushukamjechoko|shushukamjechoko]] || [[word:kukukamjechoko|kukukamjechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukamjechoko|thukamjechoko]] || [[word:jukamjechoko|jukamjechoko]] || [[word:shukamjechoko|shukamjechoko]] || [[word:kukamjechoko|kukamjechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukamjechoko|thukamjechoko]] || [[word:jukamjechoko|jukamjechoko]] || [[word:shukamjechoko|shukamjechoko]] || [[word:kukamjechoko|kukamjechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekamjechoko|thekamjechoko]] || [[word:jekamjechoko|jekamjechoko]] || [[word:shekamjechoko|shekamjechoko]] || [[word:kekamjechoko|kekamjechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokamjechoko|thothokamjechoko]] || [[word:jojokamjechoko|jojokamjechoko]] || [[word:shoshokamjechoko|shoshokamjechoko]] || [[word:kokokamjechoko|kokokamjechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokamjechoko|thokamjechoko]] || [[word:jokamjechoko|jokamjechoko]] || [[word:shokamjechoko|shokamjechoko]] || [[word:kokamjechoko|kokamjechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokamjechoko|thokamjechoko]] || [[word:jokamjechoko|jokamjechoko]] || [[word:shokamjechoko|shokamjechoko]] || [[word:kokamjechoko|kokamjechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kamjechoko|th忙kamjechoko]] || [[word:j忙kamjechoko|j忙kamjechoko]] || [[word:sh忙kamjechoko|sh忙kamjechoko]] || [[word:k忙kamjechoko|k忙kamjechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakamjechoko|thathakamjechoko]] || [[word:jajakamjechoko|jajakamjechoko]] || [[word:shashakamjechoko|shashakamjechoko]] || [[word:kakakamjechoko|kakakamjechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakamjechoko|thakamjechoko]] || [[word:jakamjechoko|jakamjechoko]] || [[word:shakamjechoko|shakamjechoko]] || [[word:kakamjechoko|kakamjechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakamjechoko|thakamjechoko]] || [[word:jakamjechoko|jakamjechoko]] || [[word:shakamjechoko|shakamjechoko]] || [[word:kakamjechoko|kakamjechoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shakamjechithi|shakamjechithi]] || [[word:shakamjechiji|shakamjechiji]] || [[word:shakamjechishi|shakamjechishi]] || [[word:shakamjechiki|shakamjechiki]]
